[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01100001 3
1 11001010 4
2 11010111 6
3 01001110 4
4 00000000 a
5 11011110 6
6 10111111 7
7 01001111 5

01 10 11111111 a
12 21 11111111 a
23 32 11111111 a
34 43 11111011 7
45 54 11101011 6
56 65 11011111 7
67 76 11011111 7
70 07 11011110 6 match 5

13 31 10111111 7 match 6
24 42 01101111 6
35 53 11111010 6
46 64 11110111 7
57 75 11001110 5
60 06 11011111 7
71 17 11111111 a

03 30 11111110 7
14 41 11111111 a
25 52 11001111 6
36 63 11111111 a
47 74 01101111 6
50 05 11011110 6 match 5
61 16 11111111 a
72 27 01001111 5 match 7

15 51 11111111 a
26 62 11011111 7
37 73 11111110 7
